Event: Spring Festival 2024
Event Date: 01/03/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: T58
Distinguished Defender Totem

Once in a while, a fiery meteorite falls on a random enemy. If it hits an enemy, the meteorite deals 64000 (+bonus of the spell power) magic damage to the target and all enemies in a small radius around it and sets all affected enemies on fire. The burning units take 76800 (+bonus of the spell power) magic damage and have their healing rate reduced by 50% for 3 sec.

Requirements: 90

User rating: item not rated yet
